code: import axios from'axios';import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const EmployeeList=()=>{const[employees,setEmployees]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('access_token');axios.get('${process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL}/api/employees/',{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}}).then(response=>setEmployees(response.data)).catch(error=>console.error('Error fetching employees:',error));},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Employee List"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{children:employees.map(employee=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:[employee.first_name," ",employee.last_name," - ",employee.role]},employee.id))})]});};export default EmployeeList;
